Planet Namek
The Namek population has recently reached 80k...yowzas!
No frames (1 window) | Frames (2 windows)
NEWS

Official statement from Funimation.net:

You asked for it... You demanded it... And now you got it! New Dragon Ball Z episodes are currently being made by FUNimation Productions. The episodes will be available this summer on video and WILL AIR ON CARTOON NETWORK THIS FALL. The series will encompass all of Goku's awesome battle with the powerful Frieza. Keep checking the FUNimation website for all the latest details.


Welcome to Namek! I am your host, Dende. On this fertile planet you will find information and images about an anime called Dragon Ball Z. Dragon Ball Z was created by Akira Toriyama and is the continuation of Dragon Ball. There are a total of 291 DBZ episodes and 13 movies, so there plenty to see. It is much more action oriented than DB, but there's still a sense of comedy in it. Goku, a Saiyan from Planet Vegeta, is the star of the show. Dragon Ball Z starts when Goku's first son, Gohan is born. Goku battles a countless number of enemies and dies numerous times during this show and is helped by his friends and goes on many journeys. I'm training to become the Earths next Kami-Sama so go ahead and explore on your own!


Well, get going!:

Home - You are here


Media - 97 great quality images, and DBZ sounds!!


The Characters - Brief descriptions of 41 DBZ characters


Episode Summeries - Short summaries of every episode shown in the U.S.!


Links - Links to other great sites...well, most of them

E-mail Dende with any comments, suggestions, complaints, admirations, complements, questions, and gibberish
Background Music(for the frameless)
The controls for the music are inside the frame, just resize it.
This Site is graciously hosted by the wonderful people at GEOCITIES
Dragon Ball Z and all its characters are owned by Akira Toriyama and Toei Animation
This site is owned and maintained by Andrew Orin, and is not offiliated with Toei or Funimation, and was edited with Microsoft Notepad, Microsoft Wordpad, and Paint Shop Pro v.5. It is designed for and will look best on Internet Explorer, although Netscape is the best!!!
